sample.query: How do I export my invoices as CSV?
sample.answer: Go to Billing > Invoices > Export and choose CSV. On Pro plans you can also bulk-export every invoice at once. Free/Standard plans export one invoice at a time. It's on the sidebar under Billing; let me know if you don't see it and I'll check your plan.
retrieved_docs: Billing > Invoices > Export lets you download invoices as CSV or PDF. Bulk export is available on Pro plans.
